emrg_triggers: Emergency calls from GNM Pressure Washing (for Chevron and SOs gas stations they manage)

non_emrg_routing.notes: Initially, calls are forwarded to Clara if Ben does not answer or declines his main business line. Once Ben has a second number for transfers, Clara will be the first point of contact and transfer to that number if a live conversation is required.

aft_hrs_flow: Emergency calls from GNM Pressure Washing (for Chevron and SOs gas stations) are patched through to Ben. All other after-hours calls will be informed that the business is closed and that someone will get back to them on the next business day.
biz_hrs_flow: Clara will answer incoming calls, particularly from new clients, for small jobs and service calls. Clara will provide information on service call fees when asked: $115 call out fee, $98/hour for residential work, billed in half-hour increments after the first half-hour. Clara will transfer calls to Ben's designated transfer number if a customer needs to speak to him directly (e.g., for complex inquiries, or if they explicitly ask to speak to someone). Initial setup: calls to Ben's main business line are forwarded to Clara if not answered or declined by Ben. This will change once Ben's transfer number is set up, at which point Clara will be the primary answerer.
open_qs: What is the official company name?
What is the main business phone number (that Clara will initially answer/receive forwarded calls from)?
What is the full business address?
What is the business's timezone (IANA format, e.g., America/Los_Angeles)?
What is the phone number for Clara to transfer emergency calls to Ben?
Is there a secondary contact name for emergency call routing?
Is there a secondary phone number for emergency call routing?
What is the priority order for emergency call routing?
What is the phone number for Clara to transfer non-emergency calls to Ben?
What is the timeout duration in seconds for a call transfer attempt?
How many times should the agent retry a call transfer before failing?
What message should the agent play if a call transfer fails?
notes: Email for post-call notifications: info@bendselectricsolutionsteam.com. SMS for post-call notifications will be sent to Ben's main business line. Contract term is 3 months, then 12 months at the same price. Pavan is the dedicated point of contact for Ben. A follow-up meeting is scheduled for Friday at 2:00 PM to review test calls and dashboard functionality. Ben is currently using his personal number as his main business line and needs a 'second number' for Clara to transfer calls to him.
